all.en: The annual budget meeting was held on Tuesday in the main conference room.
all.zh: 年度預算會議於週二在主會議室召開。

all.en: Chief Financial Officer Diana Park chaired the session beginning at nine in the morning.
all.zh: 財務長 Diana Park 於上午九點主持會議。

all.en: All department heads attended, along with two members of the audit committee.
all.zh: 全體部門主管出席，並有兩位稽核委員會成員參加。

all.en: The meeting opened with a review of last year actual versus budgeted spending.
all.zh: 會議首先回顧去年實際支出與預算的對比情形。

all.en: Overall operating expenses came in 3 percent below the approved plan.
all.zh: 整體營業費用較核准計畫低百分之三。

all.en: Marketing exceeded its allocation due to an unplanned product launch campaign.
all.zh: 行銷因一場非預期的產品上市活動超出預算分配。

all.en: Information technology underspent because of delayed hardware refresh projects.
all.zh: 資訊科技因硬體更新專案延後而支出不足。

all.en: Ms. Park then introduced the proposed budget framework for the coming fiscal year.
all.zh: Park 女士接著介紹下一個會計年度的擬議預算框架。

all.en: Total operating budget is proposed at 218 million dollars, up 4 percent.
all.zh: 提議的總營業預算為兩億一千八百萬美元，成長百分之四。

all.en: Capital expenditure is set at 35 million dollars with a focus on automation.
all.zh: 資本支出設定為三千五百萬美元，重點投入自動化。

all.en: Each department received preliminary targets based on revenue assumptions.
all.zh: 各部門依據營收假設收到初步目標。

all.en: Operations requested an increase to fund predictive maintenance software.
all.zh: 營運部門申請增加經費以資助預測性維護軟體。

all.en: Human resources proposed a 6 percent rise to support new hiring plans.
all.zh: 人資部門提議增加百分之六以支援新進人員招募計畫。

all.en: Legal asked for additional funds to cover anticipated compliance reviews.
all.zh: 法務要求額外經費以因應預期的合規審查。

all.en: Sales presented a revised travel budget reflecting renewed customer visits.
all.zh: 業務部門提出反映重啟客戶拜訪的修訂差旅預算。

all.en: Several attendees raised concerns about rising utility and insurance costs.
all.zh: 多位與會者對水電與保險成本上升表達憂慮。

all.en: Finance committed to provide updated sensitivity analyses by next Friday.
all.zh: 財務承諾下週五前提供更新後的敏感度分析。

all.en: A contingency reserve of 4 percent was endorsed by the committee.
all.zh: 委員會背書設置百分之四的應急準備金。

all.en: Capital projects above 2 million dollars will require board approval.
all.zh: 金額逾兩百萬美元的資本專案須經董事會核准。

all.en: Department heads must submit revised templates within ten business days.
all.zh: 部門主管須於十個工作天內提交修訂表單。

all.en: Quarterly variance reports will continue to be circulated to all leaders.
all.zh: 季度差異報告將持續發送給所有主管。

all.en: The next planning checkpoint is scheduled for the first week of October.
all.zh: 下一次規劃檢核點訂於十月第一週。

all.en: Ms. Park thanked participants and adjourned the meeting at 12:15 p.m.
all.zh: Park 女士感謝與會者，並於中午十二點十五分宣布散會。

all.en: Minutes were prepared by the finance analyst team for review and approval.
all.zh: 會議紀錄由財務分析師團隊撰寫，供審閱與核准。

all.en: Draft minutes will be circulated to all attendees within three business days.
all.zh: 會議紀錄草稿將於三個工作天內發送給所有與會者。

all.en: Any corrections or comments should be returned to the finance team by Friday.
all.zh: 任何修正或意見請於週五前回覆財務團隊。

all.en: A separate session will be arranged to discuss long-term capital allocation strategy.
all.zh: 將另行安排會議討論長期資本配置策略。

all.en: The finance team will host budget office hours every Wednesday afternoon.
all.zh: 財務團隊將於每週三下午提供預算諮詢時段。

all.en: Training on the new budgeting software will be available for all department analysts.
all.zh: 全體部門分析師可參加新預算軟體的訓練。

all.en: Zero-based budgeting principles will be piloted in two departments next quarter.
all.zh: 下季將於兩個部門試行零基預算原則。

all.en: Benchmarking data from industry peers will be shared at the next planning checkpoint.
all.zh: 下一次規劃檢核點將分享同業基準比較資料。

all.en: Currency hedging strategies for international subsidiaries are under active review.
all.zh: 海外子公司的匯率避險策略正積極檢視中。

all.en: All approved budgets will be loaded into the financial planning system by mid-November.
all.zh: 所有核准的預算將於 11 月中旬前載入財務規劃系統。

all.en: The committee thanked the finance team for their thorough preparation and analysis.
all.zh: 委員會感謝財務團隊周延的籌備與分析工作。

all.en: Forecast accuracy targets were revised upward to encourage more disciplined planning.
all.zh: 預測準確度目標已上修，以鼓勵更具紀律的規劃。

all.en: Department leaders agreed to align headcount plans with strategic project priorities.
all.zh: 各部門主管同意將人力計畫與策略專案優先順序對齊。

all.en: Travel and entertainment expenses will be reviewed monthly for compliance with new limits.
all.zh: 差旅與招待費用將每月檢視，確保符合新限額規定。

all.en: Vendor consolidation efforts are projected to deliver 1.2 million dollars in annual savings.
all.zh: 供應商整合作業預計每年可節省一百二十萬美元。

all.en: An updated chart of accounts will be released to ensure consistent reporting across regions.
all.zh: 將發布更新後的會計科目表，以確保各地區報告口徑一致。

all.en: Risk-adjusted return targets will guide all major capital allocation decisions next year.
all.zh: 明年所有重大資本配置決策將依風險調整後報酬目標進行。

all.en: Audit committee feedback will be incorporated into the final budget proposal before approval.
all.zh: 稽核委員會的意見將於核准前納入最終預算提案。

all.en: Tax planning opportunities related to recent legislation were briefly discussed by the team.
all.zh: 團隊簡短討論近期立法帶來的稅務規劃機會。

all.en: Internal control improvements will be highlighted in the upcoming quarterly board meeting.
all.zh: 即將舉行的季度董事會將著重說明內部控制的改善情形。

all.en: The committee looks forward to a financially disciplined and growth-focused fiscal year ahead.
all.zh: 委員會期待迎接財務紀律嚴明且聚焦成長的新會計年度。

all.en: My boss spent the whole weekend redoing his department's spreadsheet, and his wife was clearly not impressed about it.
all.zh: 我老闆整個週末都在改部門的試算表，他太太顯然不太開心。

all.en: Honestly, I dread the annual budget meeting because somehow my coffee always goes cold before the second agenda item.
all.zh: 說真的我超怕年度預算會議，因為我的咖啡總是在第二項議題前就冷掉了。

all.en: Have you ever submitted a budget request and discovered you forgot to include the most expensive item on your list?
all.zh: 你有沒有提交預算後，才發現自己漏掉清單上最貴的那一項？

all.en: My finance colleague brings homemade cookies to every meeting, and the difficult discussions somehow always go smoother because of them.
all.zh: 我財務部同事每次開會都帶自己做的餅乾，難談的議題不知怎麼總是因此變順利。

all.en: I once misread a budget line by a factor of ten, and my CFO was very patient when she explained the difference.
all.zh: 我有一次把預算金額看錯十倍，財務長很有耐心地跟我解釋差在哪。

all.en: Honestly, marketing always exceeds its budget, and we all just accept it as a normal fact of organizational life.
all.zh: 說真的，行銷部年年超支，大家都已經把它當成組織裡的日常了。

all.en: My team submitted our headcount request three days late, and our manager teased us about it for the rest of the quarter.
all.zh: 我們組人力申請晚交三天，主管接下來一整季都拿這件事消遣我們。

all.en: I learned the hard way that zero-based budgeting takes way more effort than just adding five percent to last year's numbers.
all.zh: 我用慘痛經驗學到，零基預算花的力氣比直接在去年數字加百分之五多得多。

all.en: Honestly, the most useful part of these meetings is hearing other departments explain what they spend money on every year.
all.zh: 老實說這種會議最有用的部分，是聽其他部門解釋他們每年的錢都花在哪。

all.en: Just a tip: build a small contingency line into every budget category, because something unexpected always shows up by November.
all.zh: 小提醒：每個預算項目都留一小筆應急金額，因為到了十一月一定會冒出意料之外的事。
